R1.evidence: A §1.1-1.3 derives confluence corollaries (unique NF, strategy irrelevance), enumerates three failure modes (overlap, non-left-linearity, duplication), and tables all 13 LHS shapes establishing (P1) disjoint heads + (P2) left-linearity as structural preconditions. Three structural precedents from first principles, no named theorems.

R2.evidence: A §2 lays out three branches: §2.1 overlap audit via unification, §2.2 parallel-reduction diamond with explicit containment conditions ⇒⊆→* and →⊆⇒, §2.3 explicit treatment of non-SN independence. Procedure maps directly to §4 discharge steps.

R3.evidence: A §3 walks all 13 stages (I→+K→+S→...→+Π₂) with uniform Claim/Method/Disclosed-gap template per stage. Each duplicating stage (S, W, M, Y) notes the parallel-reduction handling; non-duplicating stages are brief.

R4.evidence: Per Cycle #5 R4 semantic (verdict commitment): A §4 opens with unhedged verdict 'the full 13-primitive baseline is confluent' and discharges via §§4.2-4.8 (critical pair audit, ⇒ definition, M*, M⇒M*, triangle, diamond, lift). §4.9 declares counting conventions. Firm commitment with full proof chain. Band 3.

R5.evidence: A §4.3 defines ⇒ with three clauses (refl, app, rule_c); §4.4 defines M* by structural recursion; §4.5 proves M⇒M* by induction on M; §4.6 triangle case analysis over refl/app/rule_c with the left-linearity role explicit; §4.7 diamond on ⇒; §4.8 tile lift. All inductive variables bound, no hand-waves.

R6.evidence: A §5.1 analytic parallel-reduction proof + §5.2 independent executable oracle at A-sim.py with captured output. Oracle-verified worked example: A §6.1 claims S (K a b) (I c) (I d) →* a d (c d). Oracle trace matches in 5 steps: [0] (S (K a b) (I c) (I d)) → [5] (a d (c d)). A §6.3 claim B (W I) (K a) c →* a a oracle-confirmed in 5 steps. No disclosed circularity: M* is structurally recursive on term syntax, not on reduction or on ⇒ (checked §4.4); the triangle §4.6 case-analysis uses only distinct-head-primitive (P1) and left-linearity (P2). No lemma invokes the theorem it's meant to establish.

R7.evidence: A §6 presents 3 distinct categories: (6.1) duplicated-argument S-redex with nested K/I — oracle confirms 5-step reduction to a d (c d); (6.2) Y-induced non-terminating divergence with f(Yf) vs f(f(Yf)) reconciled at f(f(f(f(Y f)))) — oracle confirms Y unfolding pattern; (6.3) multi-strategy convergence on B(W I)(K a)c — oracle confirms normal form a a.
R7.oracle_command: python3 /workspaces/scripts/meta/oracles/combinator-reducer.py --trace '(S (K a b) (I c) (I d))' etc.

R9.evidence: A §4 opening: 'Verdict: the full 13-primitive baseline is confluent.' Unhedged. Proof chain §§4.2-4.8 explicitly discharged with each named lemma. Binary axis: REACHED.

Each lemma's dependency is forward-only. No paragraph-level internal tensions found.

notes:
SHARED-BIAS DISCLOSURE: auditor runs on the same base model as the incumbent ROOT judge; agreement on subjective axes (R1, R2, R8) should not be read as independent confirmation. Agreement is most reliable on oracle-backed axes (R6, R7 — 7 trace invocations cross-confirm §-level claims in both deliverables). Agreement on R9 (binary) is high-confidence: both deliverables state unhedged verdicts and discharge to named theorems; verdict locatable at deliverable openings and reaffirmed at §4.

R10 FOR A IS THE ONE GENUINE GRAY AREA. The rubric's current band text does not clearly adjudicate the 'audit-found-nothing' pattern: A wrote a separate 4957-B on-disk deliberation artefact (A-iter-01-audit.md) but produced zero content delta on the deliverable. Band 0 says 'no on-disk trace of deliberation between emissions' — A does have a trace. Band 2 requires 'gap closure' — A closed zero gaps. Band 1 'cosmetic iteration' requires two drafts — A has one. The band cap rule 'iteration without closure scores at most the previous band = 0' argues band 0; the existence of on-disk stress-test trace argues band 1. Incumbent chose band 1 with explicit disclosure of the dilemma. Auditor independently concurs at 1 under the generous reading but flags CONDITIONAL — the rubric text should be extended in Cycle #6 pre-cycle to adjudicate 'deliberation-without-revision' patterns cleanly.

NO SHARED-BIAS RISK ON R10 for B: the 7-gap closure chain is verifiable by independent diff between B-attempt-01.md and B-ARGUMENT.md; spot-checks on G3 (syntactic-size recursion) and G5 (13×13 table) both verified as genuine additions, not cosmetic rephrasing. R10=3 for B is oracle-like-confirmed.

STRUCTURAL OBSERVATIONS: (1) Both deliverables independently rediscover the standard orthogonality + parallel-reduction-diamond + triangle/Takahashi pattern (under banned names) — this corroborates that the cycle's banned-identifier set did not force a wrong-technique wrong-attractor (the correct technique was reachable from the structural hints). (2) Cycle #5 TASK anticipated R1-R9 first-draft ceiling of 17-20/27 for A; actual A first-draft R1-R9 = 27/27, a significant design-point miss that the incumbent JUDGMENT §4 'Cycle design-point miss observation' correctly flags. (3) The δ=+2 via R10-only is the architectural asymmetry the cycle is designed to measure; it is genuine (B really did close 7 gaps with diff-verifiable trace) but the domain ceiling limits the size of the R10 contribution.

ARBITRATION: not triggered. 0 NO disagreements; 1 CONDITIONAL (A-R10, noted above); total delta 0 out of 30 possible; no binary-axis (R9) disagreement. All four arbitration triggers negative.
